org.springframework.data.neo4j.core.schema.CompositeProperty.Phase

Packages that use CompositeProperty.Phase
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.neo4j.core.schema
This package contains the schema that is defined by a set of classes, representing nodes and relationships and their properties.

  • Uses of CompositeProperty.Phase in org.springframework.data.neo4j.core.schema
